_comment: Configuracao completa com os 3 hooks criticos da Trilha 4.
_comment2: Adapte os paths para o seu home. Recomenda-se instalar em ~/.claude/settings.json (user-level).

hooks.command: python3 -c 'import json, sys, os; p = os.path.expanduser("~/.memory/prime.md"); c = open(p).read() if os.path.exists(p) else ""; x = os.path.expanduser("~/.memory/context.md"); c2 = open(x).read() if os.path.exists(x) else ""; print(json.dumps({"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": (c + chr(10) + chr(10) + c2).strip()}}))'

python3 -c 'import json, sys, os; p = os.path.expanduser("~/.memory/context.md"); c = open(p).read() if os.path.exists(p) else ""; print(json.dumps({"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreCompact", "additionalContext": c}}))'

bash -c 'P=$(cat); KW=$(echo "$P" | tr "[:upper:]" "[:lower:]"); K=""; if echo "$KW" | grep -q "schema\|sql\|banco"; then K="schema.md"; elif echo "$KW" | grep -q "deploy\|infra\|nginx"; then K="infra.md"; fi; if [ -n "$K" ] && [ -f "$HOME/.memory/knowledge/$K" ]; then python3 -c "import json,sys; c=open(\"$HOME/.memory/knowledge/$K\").read(); print(json.dumps({\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"UserPromptSubmit\",\"additionalContext\":c}}))"; else echo "{}"; fi'
